title: Alias constants for keyword expansion and synonym mapping
purpose: Provides synonym and abbreviation mappings for expanding search queries and generating related aliases. Used by the alias generator to enhance topic discovery and semantic matching.
module_context: Exports type definitions for topic content and alias generator options, along with constant sets for stop words, synonyms, and abbreviations used in keyword expansion.

steps.content: Define a set of common stop words to exclude from keyword extraction.
These words are too generic to be useful as aliases.
Include articles, prepositions, conjunctions, pronouns, and auxiliary verbs.
Define mappings for common topic terms to their synonyms.
Used to expand queries and generate related aliases.
Include mappings for authentication, database, API, frontend, configuration, and development terms.
Define mappings for common topic terms to their standard abbreviations.
Used to expand queries with shorter forms and generate abbreviated aliases.
Include mappings for authentication, database, application, API, and architecture terms.
